source_text:
在過去一個世紀，友邦保險
於亞洲區內，為極需我們服務的
社區大眾提供保障而備受稱譽，
這令我們引以為榮。

source_text:
友邦保險在亞洲歷史悠久，源遠流長，經歷各種社會動盪和不明朗時期仍能妥善管理業務，因而贏得卓著的
聲譽，體現友邦保險誠可信賴、強韌穩健，並堅持為持分者做對的事。自2020年初以來，2019冠狀病毒病大流
行導致營商環境不斷變化及日趨複雜，而政治、宏觀經濟及資本市場亦出現前所未見的轉移。在這樣的環境下，
友邦保險的財務實力，以及「幫助大眾活出健康、長久、好生活」的目標，更具重大意義。本人衷心感謝友邦
保險所有員工、代理和合作夥伴，即使面對最嚴峻的挑戰，他們仍關懷社區，克盡己職，專心致志地為客戶、
其家庭以及我們的社區提供支援。

style_rules: Maintain parallel structure in lists and tables
Translate table headers consistently with body text

initial_translation: AIA has a long and storied history in Asia. Having navigated various periods of social upheaval and uncertainty while managing our business prudently, we have earned a distinguished reputation that reflects our trustworthiness, resilience and steadfast commitment to doing the right thing for our stakeholders. Since early 2020, the COVID-19 pandemic has created an increasingly complex and dynamic business environment, while political, macroeconomic and capital market conditions have undergone unprecedented shifts. In such circumstances, AIA's financial strength and our purpose of helping people live healthier, longer, better lives take on even greater significance. I wish to express my heartfelt gratitude to all AIA employees, agents and partners who, despite facing the most severe challenges, have continued to care for our communities, fulfilled their responsibilities with dedication, and remained focused on providing support to our customers, their families and our communities.

In such circumstances, AIA's financial strength and our purpose of helping people live healthier, longer, better lives take on greater significance. I express my heartfelt gratitude to all AIA employees, agents and partners who, despite severe challenges, have continued to care for our communities, fulfilled their responsibilities with dedication, and remained focused on supporting our customers, their families and our communities.

source_text:
由於2019冠狀病毒病相關的控制措施對新業務銷售造成影響，新業務價值下降至27.65億美元。我們迅速採用
嶄新的數碼工具，提升業務運作效率，加上近期放寬外出限制，帶動銷售動力強勁復蘇，並延續至2021年初。

style_rules: Maintain parallel structure in lists and tables
Translate table headers consistently with body text

initial_translation: Due to control measures related to COVID-19 impacting new business sales, New Business Value declined to US$2.765 billion. We rapidly adopted innovative digital tools to enhance operational efficiency, and with the recent relaxation of movement restrictions, sales momentum experienced strong recovery, which continued into early 2021.
compact_translation: COVID-19 control measures impacted new business sales, with New Business Value declining to US$2.765 billion. We rapidly adopted innovative digital tools to enhance operational efficiency, and with relaxed movement restrictions, sales momentum recovered strongly, continuing into early 2021.
final_translation: COVID-19 control measures impacted new business sales, with New Business Value declining to US$2.765 billion. We rapidly adopted innovative digital tools to enhance operational efficiency, and with relaxed movement restrictions, sales momentum recovered strongly, continuing into early 2021.

source_text:
稅後營運溢利增長5%至59.42億美元，產生的基本自由盈餘則上升7%至58.43億美元，反映我們擁有高質素的
經常性盈利來源。內涵價值權益創新高，達672億美元。截至2020年12月31日，集團當地資本總和法覆蓋率為
374%，足證我們雄厚的資本實力和嚴謹的財務管理。

style_rules: Maintain parallel structure in lists and tables
Translate table headers consistently with body text

initial_translation: Operating Profit After Tax grew 5% to USD 5.942 billion, with underlying Free Surplus generated increasing 7% to USD 5.843 billion, reflecting our high-quality recurring earnings sources. Embedded Value equity reached a record high of USD 67.2 billion. As at 31 December 2020, the Group's local capital aggregation method coverage ratio stood at 374%, demonstrating our strong capital position and prudent financial management.

流行的影響深遠，但我衷心感謝我們的員工、代理和合作夥伴在適應新工作方式並確保為客戶提供無間斷的支援
時，展現靈活應變的能力和克盡己職的精神。

initial_translation: AIA is a trusted partner our customers can rely on, providing them with peace of mind as they focus on financial security and family protection. Despite the far-reaching impact of the COVID-19 pandemic, I am deeply grateful to our employees, agents and partners for demonstrating flexibility and dedication in adapting to new ways of working and ensuring uninterrupted support to our customers.

source_text:
自疫情大流行開始以來，本集團的各業務團隊反應迅速，積極協助紓緩對社區的影響，同時確保員工安全。本集
團為此廣泛採取多項措拖，包括財政支持、提供醫療物資、免費保障覆蓋、獲取醫療保健資源、精簡服務流程和
加快理賠支付，令我引以為榮。我們一如既往找出每一個可以作出理賠的理由，年內已支付逾160億美元的保險
給付及理賠，為客戶提供極其重要的財務保障。

page_sections.target_section: Group Chief Executive and President's Report

style_rules: Maintain parallel structure in lists and tables
Use active voice where source permits
Translate corporate mission statements with care

initial_translation: Since the onset of the pandemic, our business teams across the Group have responded swiftly and actively assisted in mitigating the impact on our communities while ensuring employee safety. We have implemented a wide range of measures, including financial support, provision of medical supplies, complimentary coverage, access to healthcare resources, streamlined service processes and accelerated claims payments, of which I am proud. We have, as always, found every reason to pay a claim, and during the year we paid out over USD 16 billion in insurance benefits and claims, providing our customers with critically important financial protection.
compact_translation: Since the pandemic onset, our business teams responded swiftly, assisting communities while ensuring employee safety. We implemented comprehensive measures including financial support, medical supplies, complimentary coverage, healthcare access, streamlined processes and accelerated claims payments. We have consistently found every reason to pay claims, disbursing over USD 16 billion in insurance benefits and claims during the year, providing customers with critical financial protection.

We have implemented a wide range of measures, including financial support, provision of medical supplies, complimentary coverage, access to healthcare resources, streamlined service processes and accelerated claims payments, of which I am proud. We have, as always, found every reason to pay a claim, and during the year we paid out over USD 16 billion in insurance benefits and claims, providing our customers with critically important financial protection.

source_text:
儘管為遏制2019冠狀病毒病傳播的措施導致新業務價值減少至27.65億美元，但隨著外出限制放寬，銷售動力轉
趨正面，並在2021年展開非常強勁的勢頭，首兩個月的新業務價值按年增長15%。我們規模龐大和持續增長的有
效保單組合所帶來的高質素和經常性收入來源，帶動2020年稅後營運溢利增加5%，期內產生的基本自由盈餘則
增長7%。截至2020年12月31日，內涵價值權益創新高，達672億美元，集團當地資本總和法覆蓋率為374%，足
證我們雄厚的資本實力和嚴謹的財務管理。

page_sections.target_section: Group Chief Executive and President's Report

style_rules: Maintain parallel structure in lists and tables
Translate table headers consistently with body text

initial_translation: Although measures to contain the spread of COVID-19 resulted in New Business Value declining to US$2.765 billion, sales momentum turned positive as mobility restrictions eased, and we entered 2021 with very strong momentum, with New Business Value in the first two months growing 15% year-on-year. Our large and growing portfolio of in-force policies, which generates high-quality and recurring income streams, drove a 5% increase in Operating Profit After Tax in 2020, while Free Surplus generated during the period grew 7%. As at 31 December 2020, Embedded Value equity reached a record high of US$67.2 billion, and the Group's local capital aggregation method coverage ratio stood at 374%, demonstrating our strong capital position and prudent financial management.
compact_translation: Although COVID-19 containment measures reduced New Business Value to US$2.765 billion, sales momentum turned positive as restrictions eased, entering 2021 with strong momentum and 15% year-on-year New Business Value growth in the first two months. Our large, growing in-force policy portfolio generated high-quality recurring income, driving 5% Operating Profit After Tax growth in 2020 and 7% Free Surplus growth. As at 31 December 2020, Embedded Value equity reached a record US$67.2 billion, with Group local capital aggregation method coverage at 374%, demonstrating strong capital position and prudent financial management.
final_translation: Although measures to contain the spread of COVID-19 resulted in New Business Value declining to US$2.765 billion, sales momentum turned positive as mobility restrictions eased, and we entered 2021 with very strong momentum, with New Business Value in the first two months growing 15% year-on-year. Our large and growing portfolio of in-force policies, which generates high-quality and recurring income streams, drove a 5% increase in Operating Profit After Tax in 2020, while Free Surplus generated during the period grew 7%. As at 31 December 2020, Embedded Value equity reached a record high of US$67.2 billion, and the Group's local capital aggregation method coverage ratio stood at 374%, demonstrating our strong capital position and prudent financial management.

source_text:
董事會建議2020年末期股息增加7.5%至每股100.30港仙。這秉承友邦保險行之已久的審慎、可持續及漸進的派息
政策，讓本集團可把握未來的增長機遇，並且保持財務靈活性。

This reflects AIA's long-standing prudent, sustainable and progressive dividend policy, which enables the Group to capitalize on future growth opportunities while maintaining financial flexibility.

source_text:
友邦保險具有多項顯著優勢，讓我們在競爭激烈的市場別樹一幟。我們在亞洲經營數十載，擁有區內無可比擬的
平台，並於我們業務所在的大部分市場雄踞領導地位。我們始終如一地百分百專注於亞洲市場，有助我們在全球
最具吸引力的壽險業地區全面把握增長機遇。這份專注結合我們領導團隊在亞洲的豐富經驗及員工的優秀質素，
一直是我們表現卓越的重要動力。

page_sections.target_section: Group Chief Executive and President's Report

style_rules: Maintain parallel structure in lists and tables
Use active voice where source permits
Translate corporate mission statements with care

initial_translation: AIA possesses multiple distinctive competitive advantages that set us apart in a highly competitive market. With decades of operations across Asia, we have built an unparalleled platform within the region and hold leading positions in most of the markets where we conduct business. Our unwavering and complete focus on the Asian market enables us to capture growth opportunities comprehensively across the world's most attractive life insurance region. This strategic focus, combined with our leadership team's extensive experience in Asia and our employees' exceptional capabilities, has been a key driver of our outstanding performance.

source_text:
我們無可比擬的分銷實力能直接接觸客戶，並提供高質素的專業建議，協助滿足亞洲消費者龐大且日益增長的長
期保障和儲蓄需求。如今大眾比以往更期望企業能以符合長遠可持續發展的方式應對他們的需要。友邦保險擁有
市場領先的品牌，以幫助大眾實踐健康、長久、好生活的目標為基礎。

page_sections.target_section: Group Chief Executive and President's Report

style_rules: Maintain parallel structure in lists and tables
Use active voice where source permits
Translate corporate mission statements with care

initial_translation: Our unparalleled distribution strength enables us to connect directly with customers and provide high-quality professional advice to help meet the substantial and growing long-term protection and savings needs of Asian consumers. Today, the public increasingly expects companies to address their needs in ways that are consistent with long-term sustainable development. AIA possesses a market-leading brand, founded on the objective of helping people achieve the goal of living a healthy, long and fulfilling life.
compact_translation: Our unparalleled distribution strength enables direct customer engagement and high-quality professional advice to meet the substantial and growing long-term protection and savings needs of Asian consumers. As the public increasingly expects companies to address their needs sustainably, AIA's market-leading brand is founded on helping people achieve healthy, long and fulfilling lives.

source_text:
我們旨在使友邦保險在科技應用方面領先全球，加強互聯互通，擴大規模和提升效率。更深入瞭解數據分析有助
我們締造獨特和個人化的客戶體驗。切合和反映個人需求和生活方式的產品及服務，改變了大眾對人壽保險的看
法，為我們與客戶建立長遠關係奠定堅實的基礎。

page_sections.target_section: Group Chief Executive and President's Report

style_rules: Maintain parallel structure in lists and tables

initial_translation: We aim to position AIA as a global leader in technology application, strengthening connectivity, expanding scale and enhancing efficiency. Deeper insights from data analytics enable us to create distinctive and personalized customer experiences. Products and services that are tailored to and reflect individual needs and lifestyles have transformed public perception of life insurance, establishing a solid foundation for building long-term relationships with our customers.

source_text:
儘管2020年是前所未見的一年，但我對亞洲壽險行業的前景和友邦保險的未來比以往更為樂觀。我們繼續挑戰自
己，發展我們的優先任務，以確保我們能繼續適切地迎合客戶期望和財務需求的轉變。我們的全新企業策略建基
於友邦保險的現有實力，推進轉型過程，以在未來為客戶提供最佳的服務。

page_sections.target_section: Group Chief Executive and President's Report

style_rules: Maintain parallel structure in lists and tables
Use active voice where source permits
Translate corporate mission statements with care

initial_translation: Despite 2020 being an unprecedented year, I am more optimistic than ever about the prospects for the life insurance industry in Asia and the future of AIA. We continue to challenge ourselves and advance our strategic priorities to ensure we remain well-positioned to meet the evolving expectations and financial needs of our customers. Our new corporate strategy builds on AIA's existing strengths and drives our transformation to deliver the best service to our customers in the years ahead.
compact_translation: Despite 2020 being unprecedented, I remain more optimistic than ever about Asia's life insurance prospects and AIA's future. We continue advancing our strategic priorities to meet evolving customer expectations and financial needs. Our new corporate strategy builds on AIA's strengths and drives transformation to deliver superior service ahead.
final_translation: Despite 2020 being unprecedented, I remain more optimistic than ever about Asia's life insurance prospects and AIA's future. We continue advancing our strategic priorities to meet evolving customer expectations and financial needs. Our new corporate strategy builds on AIA's strengths and drives transformation to deliver superior service ahead.
